verb לבנות

to found, establish, base

be built, constructed; established, founded

verb להבין

to understand, comprehend; study; interpret

verb הובן

be understood, comprehended, grasped

masculine noun

boy, son, child (male) , sonny

aged; member of; worthy of, deserving

adverb

preposition

in them (3rd person plural fem.)
